name: What's Up Velakkari
overview: What's Up Velakkari is a ZEE5 Tamil Original. The story revolves around a modern city-bred husband, an old-fashioned wife who hails from a village, and an ultra-modern maid who hails from the city. Situations turn hilarious when the husband starts to get attracted towards the maid, making the wife change her outlook to be a modern woman. Will the wife be able to make her husband get attracted towards her over the maid?

trailers.title: What's Up Velakkari | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Streaming Now On ZEE5
